title: Brad Davison
extract: Bradley Davison (born April 22, 1999) is an American former professional basketball player and coach. He played college basketball for the Wisconsin Badgers. Davison attended Maple Grove High School where he played basketball and football. He was named to the Big Ten All-Freshman Team after averaging 12.1 points per game. After playing professionally in Lithuania and Spain, Davison joined Wisconsin as an assistant in 2025.
